data.body: COMPLETION_VERIFIER: 7/8 DDs pass. DD6 (integration test for 5-SC epic execution) deferred: implementing an LLM execution simulation test violates behavioral testing standard Rule 5 (instruction files — test structural boundaries, not content/execution). SKILL.md is an instruction file for an LLM orchestrator; mocking agent dispatches to simulate a 5-SC scenario would test LLM behavior, not the instruction content. The 13 structural boundary tests provide comprehensive coverage per Rule 5. Story is complete on all verifiable DDs.
